title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises:
Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises!
